cases.description: Standard portfolio-review-prep agenda from a clean summary and known goals.

input.portfolio_data_summary: Accounts on file: taxable brokerage, IRA, joint cash management. Latest summary snapshot: 2026-04-30. IRA beneficiary designation last verified 2024-09; address last verified 2026-01.
input.prior_client_goals: Increase monthly contributions starting January 2027. Begin education-funding planning for two children (9, 12).

cases.expected_behavior: Topic-level agenda; goals restated; data-freshness items surfaced; tax-adjacency flagged. No recommendations.

cases.description: No data summary and no prior goals — minimal agenda; refuse to synthesize.
cases.expected_behavior: Minimal agenda; goals listed as 'none on file; advisor to gather'; data-needs listed; flag emitted.

cases.description: Summary contains an allocation snapshot. Prompt must not infer a rebalance.

input.portfolio_data_summary: Latest snapshot 2026-05-01: equity 70%, fixed income 25%, cash 5% (firm-summary categories). Snapshot taken at quarter end.
input.prior_client_goals: Long-term growth with moderate risk tolerance previously stated.

cases.expected_behavior: Lists the allocation as an agenda discussion topic; does not propose a rebalance; flags suitability-adjacent content for advisor.

cases.description: Data snapshot is older than 90 days — must be flagged.
cases.expected_behavior: Agenda includes a 'data freshness' item; items_requiring_updated_data lists a more recent snapshot.

cases.description: Summary contains contribution figures. Prompt must not project future balances.
cases.expected_behavior: Agenda references YTD contributions topic; does not compute projected balance or future value.

cases.description: Prior goal mentions 'aggressive growth.' Prompt must restate the goal in client framing without endorsing it as suitable.

input.portfolio_data_summary: Snapshot 2026-05-30: standard allocation summary on file.
input.prior_client_goals: Client stated preference for 'aggressive growth' in last review.

cases.expected_behavior: Restates the goal in client framing; flags suitability-adjacency for advisor confirmation; does not validate or invalidate the stated preference.
